output_format: Maximum average value among all subtrees
explanation: DFS returns (sum, count) for each subtree. average = sum / count. Track the maximum average seen.
answer:
def maximumAverageSubtree(root):
    res = 0
    def dfs(node):
        nonlocal res
        if not node: return 0, 0
        l_sum, l_cnt = dfs(node.left)
        r_sum, r_cnt = dfs(node.right)
        s = l_sum + r_sum + node.val
        n = l_cnt + r_cnt + 1
        res = max(res, s / n)
        return s, n
    dfs(root); return res
